title: Exhibition - Original Art & Wine Tasting
description: BUSINESS NEWS - It’s been a long time...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - It’s been a long time coming - House of Maria — the hidden gem you’ve walked past without ever truly knowing what waits inside, is finally hosting an exhibition and it is open for the public.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - It’s been a long time coming - House of Maria — the hidden gem you’ve walked past without ever truly knowing what waits inside, is finally hosting an exhibition and it is open for the public."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Meet the artist behind the work, explore her breathtaking originals, and sip on a glass of wine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A Night of Art & Wine in Mossel BayThe exhibition features original pieces by artist Maria Magdalena Oosthuizen, who describes her work as “deeply personal, a reflection of life, faith, and the moments that shape us. I don’t just paint to fill a canvas,” Maria shares. “I paint what I feel, what moves me. My hope is that others will feel something too, peace, connection, or just a little stillness in a busy world.”","html":"A Night of Art & Wine in Mossel Bay
The exhibition features original pieces by artist Maria Magdalena Oosthuizen, who describes her work as “deeply personal, a reflection of life, faith, and the moments that shape us. I don’t just paint to fill a canvas,” Maria shares. “I paint what I feel, what moves me. My hope is that others will feel something too, peace, connection, or just a little stillness in a busy world.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests can enjoy a relaxed wine tasting while browsing her work in a calm, creative setting. It's a chance to slow down, take in something beautiful, and maybe even see life a little differently. Perfect for anyone who enjoys meaningful art, good wine, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere.","html":"Guests can enjoy a relaxed wine tasting while browsing her work in a calm, creative setting. It's a chance to slow down, take in something beautiful, and maybe even see life a little differently. Perfect for anyone who enjoys meaningful art, good wine, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ART Class with Maria Magdalena OosthuizenEver wished you could just paint without overthinking it? Come just as you are!  We’ve got everything ready for you, even the aroma.  All you need to do is arrive, relax, and enjoy creating.","html":"ART Class with Maria Magdalena Oosthuizen
Ever wished you could just paint without overthinking it? Come just as you are! We’ve got everything ready for you, even the aroma. All you need to do is arrive, relax, and enjoy creating."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spaces are limited, so book soon and treat yourself to a day filled with beauty, joy, and connection.","html":"Spaces are limited, so book soon and treat yourself to a day filled with beauty, joy, and connection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Details:","html":"Details:
"},{"type":"list","items":["R2700","July 19, 2025","Book at 071 889 8638"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Feeling inspired? There are still a few spots open for Maria’s upcoming paint class, a creative, no-pressure space to explore your own artistic side. All are welcome, no experience needed, just a love for creating!","html":"Feeling inspired?
There are still a few spots open for Maria’s upcoming paint class, a creative, no-pressure space to explore your own artistic side. All are welcome, no experience needed, just a love for creating!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Did you see Maria’s stunning canvas prints? We now offer beautiful full-face canvas prints of her artworks, printed on high-quality canvas and professionally stretched and framed in elegant teak wood.","html":"Did you see Maria’s stunning canvas prints? We now offer beautiful full-face canvas prints of her artworks, printed on high-quality canvas and professionally stretched and framed in elegant teak wood."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More info: 071 889 8638","html":"More info: 071 889 8638"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Did you see Maria’s stunning canvas prints? We now offer beautiful full-face canvas prints of her artworks, printed on high-quality canvas and professionally stretched and framed in elegant teak wood."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More info: 071 889 8638","html":"More info: 071 889 8638"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
